title: La stimulation épidurale dans le traitement des douleurs chroniques
study_question: Is epidural stimulation effective for treating chronic pain in failed disc syndrome patients?
population_assessed: Twenty patients with internalized epidural stimulators for chronic pain from failed disc syndrome.
outcome_measures: Pain control, physical activity restoration, medication requirements, electrode migration
inclusion_criteria: Patients with chronic pain from failed disc syndrome requiring surgical intervention.
answer_to_study_question: Good pain relief and restored physical activity in 50% of cases; electrode migration and infection complications noted.
